name: Black Bean Polenta/ Nancy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beans: Soak dried black beans overnight or perform a quick soak and cook them the same day. Refrigerate if needed.
2. In a large pot, bring 8 cups of water to a boil. Add salt. Gradually add polenta while stirring constantly until thick enough to leave the sides of the pan. Cook for 20 minutes or until thickened.
3. Mix in green onion and half of the cheese. Pour this mixture into an 9" x 13" baking dish.
4. Spread salsa over the mixture, then layer with drained black beans, chopped chilies, and remaining cheese.
5. Pour the rest of the polenta on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Let cool before cutting into servings. Reheat if necessary before serving.
This recipe makes 8 very generous servings.
